'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=8IARodV8WSoMFGuAaYZSfKtC_r_ASbRHkYz.iExLjfw-1773986577-1.0.1.1-LgZwuOePWJhdGl5r9Bb3LG9pmL4E5nn4qgXNV0eqTDk"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
